mission.title: backstage: [Plugin] Nomad
mission.description: A Nomad plugin for Backstage that provides full lifecycle management of HashiCorp Nomad tasks, including job versions and allocation tracking directly from the Backstage service catalog. Requested by 43+ users.

steps.title: Check current Backstage setup
steps.description:
Verify your Backstage installation is running:
```bash
# If running via Docker:
docker ps | grep backstage

# If deployed on Kubernetes:
kubectl get pods -n backstage
```
This plugin requires a running Backstage instance and a Nomad cluster accessible from the Backstage backend.

steps.title: Install the Nomad plugin
steps.description:
Add the Nomad plugin to your Backstage app from [PR #18010](https://github.com/backstage/backstage/pull/18010):
```bash
cd packages/app
yarn add @backstage-community/plugin-nomad
```
The plugin provides two main components: a Job Versions card and an Allocations table.

steps.title: Configure the Nomad connection
steps.description:
Add the Nomad configuration to your `app-config.yaml`:
```yaml
nomad:
  addr: 'http://localhost:4646'
```
Then annotate your catalog entities to link them to Nomad jobs:
```yaml
apiVersion: backstage.io/v1alpha1
kind: Component
metadata:
  annotations:
    nomad.io/namespace: default
    nomad.io/job-id: redis
    nomad.io/group: 'redis|prometheus-collector'
```
The `nomad.io/job-id` annotation is required. The `nomad.io/group` annotation is optional and filters allocations to specific task groups.

steps.title: Verify the Nomad plugin works
steps.description:
Open Backstage and navigate to a service entity that has Nomad annotations:
1. Check that the Nomad tab appears on the entity page
2. Verify that job versions are displayed correctly
3. Confirm that allocations for the linked Nomad job/group are listed

resolution.summary: A community-contributed Nomad plugin for Backstage provides job version tracking and allocation management directly from the service catalog. Configure the Nomad server address in app-config.yaml and annotate catalog entities with nomad.io/job-id to link them to Nomad jobs.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: backstage.io/v1alpha1
kind: Component
metadata:
  annotations:
    nomad.io/namespace: default
    nomad.io/job-id: redis
    nomad.io/group: 'redis|prometheus-collector'

prerequisites.description: A running Backstage instance (via Docker, npx @backstage/create-app, or Kubernetes) and a HashiCorp Nomad cluster.
